channel.title: vscodium on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in vscodium on Notities

item.title: Stel de versie van de Python interpreter in voor de extensie: Code Runner in VSCodium
item.description: # File name: version_used.py # This prints the version of Python being used by the Code Runner extension in VSCodium # Set by going to: File -> Preferences -> Settings -> Search Settings -> code-runner.executorMap -> Edit in settings.json # “python”: “/bin/python3.9 -u”,\ # To run this script press the little play button on the top right in the editor import sys print(sys.version)

item.title: Installeer de editor VSCodium op Ubuntu Linux
item.description: $ wget -qO - https://gitlab.com/paulcarroty/vscodium-deb-rpm-repo/raw/master/pub.gpg | sudo apt-key add - $ sudo echo ‘deb https://vscodium.c7.ee/debs/ vscodium main’ | sudo tee –append /etc/apt/sources.list.d/vscodium.list $ sudo apt update $ sudo apt install codium
